title: MineColonies Vanillafied
description: A resource pack for the MineColonies mod that aims to make the blocks look more vanilla.
body:
![MineColonies Vanillafied Temporary Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35937edd3098f262c956c527256c02185b274e1e.png)

A resource pack for MineColonies mod that aims to make the blocks look more vanilla. \
<sub>Also the domum ornamentum standing/laying barrels :) </sub> 

Like MineColonies's original models, this resource pack's models currently use vanilla textures, which means that resource packs can be used and the models will use the other texure/resource packs's textures instead of vanilla textures! \
<sub> Results may vary though, as some models use really weird parts of the vanilla textures and may look off with high resolution or very different than vanilla packs. (Later I may spend time tweaking models to be as compatible as possible, or make a branch with enhanced texture pack support.)</sub>

### Additional Information

Currently this resource pack only targets 1.20.1 (But may work on 1.21, I havent tested yet.)
I will be making version specific branches and releases of the resource pack eventually, and I would also like to backport to older versions of MineColonies as well :)

Some models I'm not too fond of that I've made and I will probably remake them at some point, but I initally started and made this resource pack for a modpack that I'm making, so for now it's good enough. Also I do want to make new original models with unique textures, not reusing vanilla textures like how the MineColonies original models work. This would allow me to make them look even more vanilla, as currently they're a bit vanilla+. (Think how all of the vanilla 1.14 villager work stations look, just that kind of style.)

#### License Information

All models and texture(s) made by me (skellys) can be found on github with their .json and blockbench (bbmodel) files.
